title: astragalus noeanus
intro: Astragalus noeanus, also known as the Noyan milkvetch, is a type of flowering plant in the legume family. This plant is primarily used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus noeanus include reducing the risk of respiratory infections, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Astragalus noeanus can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as capsules, tablets, teas, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health issues.
